machine.name: localai/session_agent_context
machine.description: Bistable flip-flop pair tracking whether the ReAct agent and its tools have been engaged in this session. Reads raw node-active signals from [104:108] and its own prior output (carry feedback) from [116:118] to produce a monotonically accumulating carry at [116:120]: once agent_ever_engaged or tools_ever_used is set HIGH it remains HIGH for the lifetime of the PE process. Four mutually exclusive sequences cover all combinations of (which node is active) × (which carries are already set).

metadata.author: localAIStack session context builder
metadata.eventSpace: 16D vector at [104:120]: [agent_active, _, tools_active, _, topo_out[0:4], rag_carry[0:4], agent_carry, tools_carry, _, _]
metadata.bistableNote: SET: a sequence fires when a node-active signal is present, writing the correct combined carry to [116:120]. HOLD: when no node fires (no agent activity this cycle), no sequence fires and PE carry-forward preserves the output. Carries only increase — there is no CLEAR path, matching the semantic 'ever engaged in this session'.
metadata.carryFeedback: Elements [12:14] of the input region mirror the machine's own output from the prior push cycle (ps[116:118]). This allows each sequence to read the existing agent/tools carry state and produce the correct non-regressive combined output.
metadata.mutualExclusivity: Seq 1/2 require element[0] HIGH (agent_active, ps[104]); Seq 3/4 require element[2] HIGH (tools_active, ps[106]). Both cannot be HIGH in the same push because push_node_signal sets exactly one node signal at a time. Within each pair, sequences are exclusive on the tools_carry (Seq 1/3) vs agent_carry (Seq 2/4) feedback bit.

sequences.name: Agent active; tools already used this session

metadata.description: Fires when the agent node is executing (ps[104] HIGH) and the tools_used carry is already set (ps[117] HIGH). Writes [1,1,0,0] — both carries remain HIGH.

metadata.name: SESS_AGENT_PRIOR_TOOLS
metadata.description: element[0]: ps[104] agent_active HIGH; element[13]: ps[117] tools_carry HIGH (feedback); all others: wildcards

sequences.name: Agent active; tools not yet used this session

metadata.description: Fires when the agent node is executing (ps[104] HIGH) and the tools_used carry is not yet set (ps[117] LOW). Writes [1,0,0,0] — sets agent carry, preserves tools carry at 0.

metadata.name: SESS_AGENT_FIRST
metadata.description: element[0]: ps[104] HIGH; element[13]: ps[117] tools_carry LOW; all others: wildcards

sequences.name: Tools active; agent already engaged this session

metadata.description: Fires when the tools node is executing (ps[106] HIGH) and the agent_engaged carry is already set (ps[116] HIGH). Writes [1,1,0,0] — preserves agent carry and sets tools carry.

metadata.name: SESS_TOOLS_AFTER_AGENT
metadata.description: element[2]: ps[106] tools_active HIGH; element[12]: ps[116] agent_carry HIGH (feedback); all others: wildcards

sequences.name: Tools active; agent not yet recorded (defensive)

metadata.description: Defensive path: fires when tools node is executing but the agent_engaged carry is not yet set (ps[116] LOW). In normal ReAct flow the agent always runs before tools, so this path handles cold-start or carry-cleared edge cases.

metadata.name: SESS_TOOLS_FIRST
metadata.description: element[2]: ps[106] HIGH; element[12]: ps[116] agent_carry LOW; all others: wildcards

inputSequences.name: Agent starts for the first time
inputSequences.pattern: agent_active=0.9, all others=0 (fresh session, no prior carry)
inputSequences.description: Agent node begins executing. No prior carry. sess-agent-first fires → agent_ever_engaged=1, tools_ever_used=0. Carry persists to next push.

metadata.notes: element[0]=0.9 HIGH; element[13]=0.0 LOW → sess-agent-first fires

inputSequences.name: Tools called after agent (normal ReAct turn)
inputSequences.description: Agent already ran (carry set), now tools node is executing. sess-tools-after-agent fires → both agent_ever_engaged=1 and tools_ever_used=1 written. Carry does not regress.

metadata.notes: element[2]=0.9 HIGH; element[12]=1.0 HIGH (agent_carry feedback) → sess-tools-after-agent fires

inputSequences.name: Agent fires again after tools (carry non-regression)
inputSequences.pattern: agent_active=0.9, both carries already set (agent=1.0, tools=1.0)
inputSequences.description: A second LLM step in the same ReAct loop. Both carries already HIGH. sess-agent-and-prior-tools fires → [1,1,0,0] — no regression in tools carry.

metadata.notes: element[0]=0.9 HIGH; element[13]=1.0 HIGH (tools_carry feedback) → sess-agent-and-prior-tools fires, carries held

inputSequences.name: Bistable hold — between agent turns
inputSequences.pattern: all signals 0.0 (no agent node active this push cycle)
inputSequences.description: No agent or tools node is executing this cycle (e.g., RAG-only push). No sequence fires. PE carry-forward holds whatever carry was written in the prior agent cycle.

metadata.expectedOutput: no output (PE carry-forward preserves prior state)
metadata.notes: All elements < 0.5 → no sequence fires → carry persists unchanged
